query:
-- Clear existing permissions
DELETE FROM user_permissions;

-- Add sample permissions for first user
INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id, granted_by, granted_at)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  'view',
  'work_group',
  g.id,
  u.id,
  NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN `groups` g
WHERE u.id = (SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
  AND g.id = (SELECT id FROM `groups` ORDER BY id LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id, granted_by, granted_at)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  'create',
  'work_group',
  g.id,
  u.id,
  NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN `groups` g
WHERE u.id = (SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
  AND g.id = (SELECT id FROM `groups` ORDER BY id LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id, granted_by, granted_at)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  'update',
  'work_group',
  g.id,
  u.id,
  NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN `groups` g
WHERE u.id = (SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
  AND g.id = (SELECT id FROM `groups` ORDER BY id LIMIT 1);

-- Show results
SELECT 
  u.full_name AS user_name,
  up.permission,
  up.scope_type,
  up.scope_id,
  up.granted_at
FROM user_permissions up
JOIN users u ON u.id = up.user_id
ORDER BY u.full_name, up.scope_type, up.scope_id, up.permission;
